_fill: YOU fill this. What must the product do? Each requirement gets an ID, a title, a description, and clear acceptance criteria.

functionalRequirements.area: Feature Area (e.g. User Management, Payments, Notifications)
functionalRequirements.title: Short title of the requirement
functionalRequirements.description: What the system must allow a user to do.
acceptanceCriteria: Add one criterion per observable behaviour
